prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3893名、4625名、5444名、10384名、6375名。2024年因选科要求调整（物理+化学必选组）出现位次大幅后移至 10384名，2025年迅速回弹至6375名，近两年波动剧烈，2025年基准位次约6375名；该校在天津市招生计划2021–2025年分别为33人、33人、31人、33人、33人， 基本稳定在33人左右；2026年计划扩至38人，较2025年增加约15%，扩招幅度明显，一定程度上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国传媒大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第82名，近年排名稳定在82–84名区间，属于中上层次211院校；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级，科研 成果突出）；2026年声誉转为偏负面（宿舍火灾事件引发校园安全关注）；抖音热度排名第11（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校国际新闻与传播、新闻学、广播电视学、网络与新媒体等核心招生专业高度关联，是学校最具吸引力的学科标签。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中国传媒大学位 于北京，对天津考生具有天然的地缘吸引力（通勤便利、京津冀协同发展），近年该校在天津招生占比稳定，无明显地域偏好变化；新闻传播学类专业2023年受张雪峰事件影响呈明显劝退态势，但计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业热度持续偏热至高热，中传在数字媒体技术、通信工程等工科专业亦 有布局，形成文理互补；天津市2026年考生总数约8.2万人（较2025年约7.2万增长约14%），竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6375名 、2026年扩招约15%、天津考生规模增长约14%带来的竞争加剧、新闻传播学劝退对王牌专业的轻微抑制、以及抖音高热反映的关注度上升，预测2026年最低录取位次约7000名，波动区间6500–7500名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 国际新闻与传播（卓越人才实验班）
- 数字媒体技术（游戏科学与技术方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 网络与新媒体（智能融媒体运营方向）
- 新闻学（新闻舆论学方向）
- 广播电视学（视听传播方向）
- 通信工程
- 广告学（品牌学方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 汉语国际教育
- 工商管理（智能商业管理方向）
- 数字出版。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6500–7500名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（网络与新媒体、新闻学、通信工程等），一档专业（国际新闻与传播实验班、数字媒体技术）可作为冲刺选择，三 档专业（汉语国际教育、工商管理）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<6500名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin were approximately 3893, 4625, 5444, 10384, and 6375 respectively. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (Physics + Chemistry mandatory group), the ranking significantly dropped to 10384, but quickly rebounded to 6375 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 6375 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 was 33, 33, 31, 33, and 33 students respectively, remaining stable at around 33 students. In 2026, the plan expands to 38 students, an increase of about 15% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Communication University of China is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 82nd, with a stable ranking in the 82–84 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2025, its reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++ level, with outstanding research achievements). In 2026, its reputation turned somewhat negative (dormitory fire incident raised campus safety concerns). It ranks 11th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention. No significant record of admission gaps was observed. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly correlated with the university's core enrollment majors such as International Journalism and Communication, Journalism, Radio and Television, and Network and New Media, making it the most attractive disciplinary label of the school.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Located in Beijing, Communication University of China has a natural geographical appeal to Tianjin candidates (convenient commuting, Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development). In recent years, its enrollment proportion in Tianjin has been stable, with no significant changes in regional preference. In 2023, Journalism and Communication majors were significantly discouraged due to the Zhang Xuefeng incident, but Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors remained hot to very hot. The university also has programs in Digital Media Technology, Communication Engineering, and other engineering majors, forming a complementary arts-science structure. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Tianjin is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from approximately 72,000 in 2025), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6375, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 15%, the intensified competition due to a 14% increase in Tianjin candidate numbers, the slight suppression of the flagship major due to the discouragement of Journalism and Communication, and the increased attention reflected by high Douyin popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 7000, with a fluctuation range of 6500–7500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- International Journalism and Communication (Outstanding Talent Experimental Class)
- Digital Media Technology (Game Science and Technology Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Network and New Media (Smart Media Convergence Operation Direction)
- Journalism (Journalism and Public Opinion Direction)
- Radio and Television (Audiovisual Communication Direction)
- Communication Engineering
- Advertising (Branding Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chinese International Education
- Business Administration (Smart Business Management Direction)
- Digital Publishing.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 6500–7500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Network and New Media, Journalism, Communication Engineering, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (International Journalism and Communication Experimental Class, Digital Media Technology) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Chinese International Education, Business Administration) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<6500), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
